criteria_version: search/inclusion_criteria.md §1 (Stage-1 title-abstract screen) — priority batch 6, ranks 500-599

decisions.reason: JESP 2017 on precise anchors × sender/recipient effects; eligible (experimental, anchoring, judgment outcome).
J Consumer Psych 2016 field study N=166,215 online reviews × psychological distance; eligible (experimental, construal, consumer-evaluation outcome).
J Consumer Research 2016 mechanism paper on distance × construal × processing mode; consumer-research venue but mechanism-focus rather than persuasion outcome; need full text per §4.4.
JESP 2016 on loss-framing × dishonest behavior; cheating outcome not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Consumer Research 2015 on scarcity reminders × selfish/generous behavior; eligible (experimental, scarcity, consumer-decision outcome).
J Consumer Research 2015 on resource scarcity × product-use creativity; eligible (experimental, scarcity, consumer outcome).
JPSP 2015 PMID on tandem anchoring × range offers in social exchange; eligible (experimental, anchoring with range, exchange outcome).

Journal of Personal Selling and Sales Management 2013 on FITD telephone prospecting cold-call methodology; eligible (commercial sales context, FITD, prospecting outcome — DIRECTLY on-thesis for closing literature).
J Consumer Psych 2013 meta-analysis of regulatory fit (Customer behavior moderators); eligible (meta-analysis).
EJSP 2012 four studies on knowledge level × anchoring effects; eligible (experimental, anchoring, judgment outcome).
J Consumer Research 2012 six studies on psychological distance × assortment size preferences; eligible (experimental, construal, consumer-choice outcome).
JESP 2011 on nonverbal-communication × influence strategy fit (DITF context); eligible (experimental, DITF, persuasion outcome).
Human Communication Research 2011 on framing × present/future-minded moderator for HPV vaccination; eligible.
J Applied Psych 2010 on organizational identification × reciprocity × unethical pro-organizational behavior; workplace UPB outcome not commercial-decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Consumer Psych 2010 on regulatory fit × attraction effect with entrant brands; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, consumer-choice outcome).
JPSP 2009 Haidt moral foundations theory measurement; false positive on 'fairness/reciprocity' (moral judgment, not compliance technique); fails §2.1.
PSPB 2009 three studies on incidental regulatory fit × persuasive message processing; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, persuasion outcome).
J Academy of Marketing Science 2009 on regulatory fit × customer loyalty programs in health club; eligible (commercial-marketing context, regulatory fit, customer-reward outcome).
J Consumer Psych 2009 on regulatory fit × decision-making attribute vs alternative processing; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, decision outcome).
JESP 2008 on framing × temporal context for college student drinking; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior outcome).
Annual Review of Psychology 2008 'Conceptual Consumption' review; theoretical, not RCT; need full text per §4.5.
JPSP 2008 'Precarious Manhood' five studies; false positive on 'social-proof' (precarious-state requires social validation but not the social-proof persuasion technique); fails §2.1.
J Consumer Psych 2007 Trope & Liberman CLT review with consumer-behavior application; eligible (synthesis of empirical construal literature with consumer-decision applications).
J Consumer Psych 2007 elaboration of CLT for consumer behavior; eligible (theoretical-empirical synthesis applied to consumer decisions).
J Applied Psych 2007 on abusive supervision × workplace deviance × negative reciprocity beliefs; workplace deviance not commercial-decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Academy of Marketing Science 2007 on perceived scarcity × consumer price-information processing; eligible (experimental, scarcity, consumer-pricing outcome).
JMR 2006 response on regulatory fit × consumer choice value; eligible (commentary in JMR responding to empirical findings).
JMR 2006 on regulatory focus × consumer preference construction × information search; eligible (experimental, regulatory focus, consumer-decision outcome).
J Consumer Psych 2005 'Unconscious Consumer' on environmental cues × consumer behavior (incl commitment-consistency); eligible (review of empirical consumer-influence literature).

PSPB 2005 on judicial sentencing × irrelevant random anchors; eligible (experimental, anchoring mechanism, decision outcome — judicial decisions are decisions made by professional experts under information; meets §2.7 lab-judgment criterion).
Current Directions Psychological Science 2005 review by Higgins of regulatory fit value; eligible (review of empirical regulatory-fit literature).
J Applied Psych 2004 study of psychological contracts × employee-employer dyad reciprocity; workplace organizational context not commercial-decision; need full text per §2.1.
PSPB 2004 on individual differences in negative reciprocity norm endorsement; not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
OBHDP 2004 on trustor/trusted-party perspectives in reciprocity decisions; eligible (experimental, reciprocity, exchange outcome).
JESP 2003 on attributions of trust × calculus of reciprocity; eligible (experimental, reciprocity, exchange outcome).
JESP 2001 on attitude-change theories implications for numerical anchoring; eligible (experimental, anchoring, judgment outcome).
OBHDP 2001 on gain-loss framing × choice separation of outcome vs descriptor formulations; eligible.
PSPB 2000 two studies on anchoring + consider-the-opposite mitigation; eligible.
OBHDP 1999 on anchoring × activation × value construction; eligible.
JESP 1999 on hypothesis-consistent testing in anchoring; eligible.
JPSP 1997 three studies on selective-accessibility mechanism of anchoring; eligible (seminal anchoring mechanism paper).
OBHDP 1997 on positive affect × anchoring in physician reasoning; eligible (experimental, anchoring, professional-judgment outcome).
JEP General 1996 five studies on basic anchoring without explicit comparison; eligible (seminal anchoring mechanism paper).
JEP General 1996 — duplicate of i=542; flag at dedup-extraction.
J Applied Psych 1996 on perceived organizational support × LMX × employee reciprocity; workplace organizational context; need full text per §2.1.
PSPB 1995 methodological paper on quantitative anchoring measurement; eligible (anchoring methodology for empirical studies).
JPSP 1993 on perceived reciprocity × social support at work; workplace organizational context; need full text per §2.1.
OBHDP 1992 on reference points × anchors × norms in judgment; eligible.
Basic and Applied Soc Psych 1992 on product scarcity × need-for-uniqueness; eligible (experimental, scarcity, consumer-preference outcome).
PSPB 1991 meta-analytic contributions to prosocial behavior incl FITD; eligible (meta-analysis touching FITD).
OBHDP 1987 on real-estate experts/amateurs × anchoring in property pricing; eligible (experimental, anchoring, commercial-pricing outcome).
JPSP 1987 — duplicate of i=159 (consistency-based compliance in children FITD); flag at dedup-extraction.
JMR 1984 on marketing managers' strategy choice (build/hold/pull-back); false positive on 'takeaway' (pull-back = managerial strategy, not closing technique); fails §2.1.
JESP 1983 on lay-inference freezing × impressional primacy × anchoring; eligible (experimental, anchoring, judgment outcome).
JMR 1983 meta-analysis of 497 response rates across 93 articles (techniques to increase questionnaire response); eligible (meta-analysis of response-compliance literature including FITD).
EJSP 1978 on DITF effects of initial request size; eligible.
JESP 1975 on reciprocity in self-disclosure to stranger; eligible (experimental, reciprocity, disclosure-compliance outcome).
JEP 1963 on anchoring in psychophysical weight-judgment; basic psychophysics not commercial; need full text per §2.1/§5.3 to judge mechanism overlap with negotiation-anchoring.
J Retailing and Consumer Services 2024 on social proof × consumer impulse buying on short-form video; eligible (commercial context, social-proof, impulse-buy outcome).
Frontiers in Psychology 2023 on partitioned vs all-inclusive framing × donation × psychological characteristics; eligible (experimental, framing, donation outcome).
J Social Psych 2022 N=99+80 on initial position toward blood donation × DITF effectiveness; eligible (experimental, DITF, donation outcome).
Journal of Retailing 2022 meta-analysis of scarcity tactics × consumer purchase intent; eligible (meta-analysis).
Frontiers in Psychology 2022 PMID on advertised information × product type × purchase intent (anchoring relevance); eligible.
European Review of Applied Psych 2021 on chaining 'but you are free' + social-proof for charitable donation; eligible (experimental, social-proof, donation outcome).
Marketing Letters 2020 three studies on negative social information × regulatory focus × charity support; eligible (experimental, social-proof variant, donation outcome).
J Psychology 2019 on regulatory fit × applicant reaction to job-explanation framing; HR/organizational context, not commercial-purchase; need full text per §2.1.
J Social Psych 2016 PMID on promising reciprocity (proposing favor for request increases compliance); eligible (experimental, reciprocity, compliance outcome).
Frontiers in Psychology 2015 on fear vs anger × risk-seeking in gain frame; framing × emotion × risk, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
PsycEXTRA 2014 — duplicate of i=237 (loss frames stickier than gain); flag at dedup-extraction.
Psychology & Marketing 2012 on attribute importance × additive vs subtractive option framing for choice; eligible (experimental, framing, consumer-choice outcome).
Psychology & Marketing 2008 on option-framing × cognitive resources × consumer choice; eligible.
J Social Psych 2002 on DITF in friends vs strangers contexts; eligible.
J Social Psych 2002 on FITD × organ-donation intentions × time-delay × requester identity; eligible.
Psychological Reports 2002 — duplicate of i=74 (lowball field setting); flag at dedup-extraction.
Psychological Reports 2002 PMID on empathy × generalized reciprocity × help-request compliance; eligible (experimental, reciprocity, compliance outcome).
Psychology Health & Medicine 2001 on DITF × beneficiary identity × health-behavior compliance; eligible.
J Social Psych 1997 two studies on metacommunication × DITF; eligible.
J Social Psych 1988 N=586 on FITD compliance × elapsed time + reminder manipulation; eligible (experimental, FITD, compliance outcome — null finding still informative).
Psychology and Marketing 1986 on lowball × buyer compliance in commercial settings; eligible (experimental, lowball, buyer-compliance outcome — directly on-thesis).
J Social Psych 1985 N=120 on interpersonal touch × social labeling × FITD; eligible.
J Social Psych 1983 two studies on FITD/DITF for altruistic behavior; eligible.
Bulletin Psychonomic Society 1982 on contrast × FITD for socially undesirable requests; eligible.
J Social Psych 1981 on two-DITF procedure + self-determination request; eligible (experimental, DITF variant, compliance outcome).
Bulletin Psychonomic Society 1980 on delay × DITF for socially undesirable requests; eligible.
J Applied Soc Psych 1979 on extrinsic-reward undermining of FITD; eligible.
Journal of Psychology 1979 short paper on lowballing buyer compliance; eligible (experimental, lowball, buyer-compliance outcome).
Psychological Reports 1974 on FITD substitution vs commitment effects; eligible.
J Social Psych 2005 note on effectiveness of FITD vs DITF; eligible (empirical Note).
Int J Psychophysiology 2009 on cardiovascular consequences of outcome framing; eligible (experimental, framing, physiological + behavior outcome — borderline but framing mechanism is core).
Global Knowledge Memory Communication 2026 on social-proof in social commerce information quality; eligible (commercial context, social-proof, consumer outcome).
2021 book on social-media marketing × social-proof effectiveness; eligible (synthesis of empirical social-proof literature in commercial setting).
Int J Nonprofit and Voluntary Sector Marketing 2020 meta-analysis on framing × charity advertising; eligible (meta-analysis).
2018 thesis on mindful consumption via social proof; thesis-level work, need full text to verify methodology per §4.8.
Behavioral Sciences 2026 IPMI model on food misinformation × corrective intentions × media literacy; framing-relevant but specific persuasion-technique fit unclear; need full text.
Biopsychosocial Science Medicine 2025 asthma biomedical white paper; false positive on 'trial-close'; fails §2.1.
BMC Psychology 2024 fNIRS study on affect labeling × emotion regulation; basic neuroscience, not commercial — need full text per §5.1 sales-mechanism parallel.
Social Psych and Personality Science 2023 on regulatory fit × experienced autonomy; SDT-adjacent, need full text to check if task context is commercial decision.
Frontiers in Psychology 2022 on educational workers' wellbeing in Brazilian Federal District; false positive on 'anchor-with-range'; fails §2.1.
Journal of Environmental Psychology 2022 systematic review on psychological distance × climate change; climate-policy context, need full text to check commercial-decision overlap.
Social Psychology of Education 2022 on regulatory fit × e-learning feedback framing; learning-context not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
